text.title: Definition of Ready — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins per-story DoR record + sprint-level ready-set shape. PM, agent, or refinement-session facilitator must satisfy these.

forbidden.pattern: per_item_results.acs without referencing AC-quality-rubric score per AC
per_item_results.nfr_coverage marked pass without per-NFR-category status (silent skip)
failures field with fix_required = "discuss with dev during sprint" (r2 + r4)
checker is the dev who will implement the story (PM/PO must be checker per r4)
decision=ready without a checked_at timestamp within the last 7 days (stale check)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Cluster multiple sub-stories that share NFR coverage into one NFR statement for the cluster.
Mark "n/a-with-reason" for an entire NFR category if the story does not touch the relevant surface (e.g., a11y N/A for pure backend; document why).
Reference a prior DoR record from the same story if it was previously ready but bumped sprints — re-check only items that may have decayed (dependencies, capacity).

list.item: Every candidate story has a DoR record with checked_at <= 7 days ago (r1)
Every per_item_result is pass OR fail OR n/a-with-reason (no nulls) (r1)
NFR coverage section has per-category status for relevant NFRs (r5)
Failed stories have specific fix_required, owned by PM (r4)
Output validates against templates/dor-record.json and templates/sprint-ready-set.json
